intent: Model stays a thin coordinator; per-view state lives in view objects, not here (Tenets 1 & 2).
Rows are typed; never index a flattened array by magic integer like row[3] (Tenet 4).
No growth of central per-view branching; views own behavior via the View interface (Tenet 2).
Background workers send messages; they never mutate shared state directly inside a timer/async callback (Tenet 5: the k10s goroutine data race).
